title: Imperfect for routines
subtitle: Say what you used to do.
overview: Use the imperfect for repeated past routines.
Words like siempre, normalmente, todos los días fit well.

items.en: Before, I used to study at night.

items.es: Cuando vivía en China, caminaba mucho.
items.en: When I lived in China, I used to walk a lot.

items.es: Mi familia comía junta los domingos.
items.en: My family used to eat together on Sundays.

items.es: Normalmente salía de casa a las ocho.
items.en: Normally I used to leave home at eight.
As a child I used to watch cartoons.
